description: State-by-state UCC searcher/filing access requirements database for RealPC Real Finance, Inc.

authorization_model.description: Alabama does NOT have a formal authorized searcher program. Free basic searches are available to anyone without an account. Advanced searches with images available through Alabama Interactive on a pay-per-search basis.

requirements.fees_for_access: None for basic search; optional Alabama Interactive subscriber $95-120/year
requirements.entity_eligibility: Open to any individual or entity

online_portal.description: Free basic UCC search portal - index only, no images

states.turnaround_time: Immediate for online; 5-10 business days for mail
states.renewal_requirements: Annual subscriber renewal if using Alabama Interactive ($95-120/year)
outreach_needed: Confirm Alabama Interactive subscriber fee ($95 vs $120/year)
XML B2B implementation guide availability
Bulk data access/licensing options

filing_office.division: State Recorder's Office, UCC Central File

authorization_model.description: Alaska has NO formal authorized searcher program. UCC records are public records. Online index searching is free and open to anyone. Online filing requires a free registration account (self-service, instant).

requirements.application_forms: None for searching; online self-service registration for filing
requirements.entity_eligibility: Open to any individual or entity

online_portal.description: Free online UCC search by debtor name, secured party name, or document/filing number

online_filing.description: Online filing portal - requires free registration

outreach_needed: Confirm whether free online search returns document images or index only
Verify current fee amounts (last regulation update 2018)
Ask about bulk/batch search or API access
Clarify filing types that appear only at district level

filing_office.physical_address: 1700 W Washington St, Fl 2, Phoenix, AZ 85007-2808
filing_office.mailing_address: Secretary of State, Attn: UCC Dept., 1700 W. Washington Street, Fl. 7, Phoenix, AZ 85007-2808

authorization_model.description: Arizona does NOT have a formal Authorized Searcher program. Free, unrestricted online search portal available 24/7 to anyone. No registration required. For electronic filing, a prepaid account must be established.

requirements.application_forms: None for searching; prepaid account form for electronic filing (call to request)
requirements.technology_requirements: Web browser; PDF capability for filing uploads

online_portal.description: Free public UCC search - uncertified (watermarked) results

certified_search.method: UCC-11 Search Request form by mail or in-person

electronic_filing.description: PDF upload for filing (requires prepaid account)

in_person.phoenix: 1700 W Washington St, Fl 2, Phoenix, AZ 85007-2808
in_person.tucson: 400 West Congress Street, Suite 221, Tucson, AZ 85701

outreach_needed: Exact UCC-11 certified search fee
Confirm UCC-1 filing fee ($5 vs $8)
UCC Department email address
Expedited certified search fees
Full list of 5 bulk data index options

filing_office.physical_address: Victory Building, 1401 W. Capitol Avenue, Suite 250, Little Rock, AR 72201
filing_office.mailing_address: Victory Building, 1401 W. Capitol Avenue, Suite 250, Little Rock, AR 72201

authorization_model.description: No formal authorized searcher program. Online access requires an INA (Information Network of Arkansas) subscriber account ($150/year). Paper searches via UCC-11 are available to the public without subscription. Per Filing Office Rules, services provided on nondiscriminatory basis.

requirements.application_forms: Online Service Agreement during INA registration
requirements.fees_for_access: $150/year INA subscription for online access (up to 10 users); paper searches available without subscription
requirements.entity_eligibility: No restrictions - open to any individual or business
requirements.technology_requirements: Internet connection and standard web browser

online_portal.description: Online UCC search - requires INA subscription

mail.address: Victory Building, 1401 W. Capitol Avenue, Suite 250, Little Rock, AR 72201

in_person.address: Victory Building, 1401 W. Capitol Avenue, Suite 250, Little Rock, AR 72201

states.turnaround_time: Instant for online; unknown for mail (outreach needed)
outreach_needed: Exact fields required on INA subscriber registration form
Bulk data download pricing and format
Whether $6/search fee applies in addition to subscription
Turnaround time for paper UCC-11 requests

filing_office.division: Business Programs Division, Uniform Commercial Code Section

authorization_model.description: California does NOT have a formal authorized searcher program. UCC records are publicly accessible. Free informal searches available to anyone; certified searches require a fee. Filing requires a free bizfile Online account.

requirements.application_forms: None for searching; free bizfile Online account for filing/certified copies

online_portal.description: bizfile Online - free UCC search by debtor name, secured party, or file number

outreach_needed: Prepaid customer account setup and minimum deposit
UCC-specific API access availability
Bulk UCC data availability and pricing
IACA XML electronic filing requirements

authorization_model.description: Fully open-access model. ALL UCC searches are FREE, including certified searches. No account needed for basic searches. Free optional account unlocks certified search reports. No authorized searcher program. Online-only system (no paper filings accepted).

requirements.application_forms: None; optional free account via self-service online registration
requirements.fees_for_access: None - all searches free; account creation free
requirements.training_requirements: None required; free e-learning courses available

online_portal.description: Colorado SOS UCC portal - free standard, advanced, and certified searches

bulk_data.description: Colorado Information Marketplace - free full UCC datasets with Socrata API

states.renewal_requirements: Account may be deleted after 18 months inactivity
outreach_needed: Prepaid account minimum deposit details (low priority)
UCC master file request process and format (low priority)

authorization_model.description: Open Public Access model. No formal authorized searcher program, no subscription required for searching. Free search available at service.ct.gov portal. Filing requires a free business.ct.gov account.

requirements.application_forms: None for search; free CT.gov account for filing

online_portal.description: Free lien records search by debtor name or lien number - no login required

bulk_data.description: Free CT Open Data Portal with nightly updates, JSON/CSV/API (Socrata)

outreach_needed: Confirm current filing fees (third-party sources vary)
Certified search ordering procedure
UCC Image Subscription current status/pricing
Volume filing arrangements

filing_office.physical_address: John G. Townsend Building, 401 Federal Street, Suite 4, Dover, DE 19901
filing_office.mailing_address: Division of Corporations, PO Box 898, Dover, DE 19903

authorization_model.description: MANDATORY Authorized Searcher program. No public search portal exists. Since Dec 1 2001, all UCC debtor searches must be performed by a state-certified Authorized Searcher. Currently 25 certified searchers (Registered Agents, Service Companies, Law Firms). Delaware provides certified searches ONLY. Separate Authorized Filer program (~28 entities) for paper filing submission.

requirements.application_forms: NOT publicly documented - requires direct outreach
requirements.entity_eligibility: Registered Agents, Service Companies, Law Firms with 'long-standing relationship with the State of Delaware'
requirements.technology_requirements: Special access to state's internal lien index (details unknown)
requirements.training_requirements: Must be 'Certified by the Delaware Division of Corporations'

e_filing.description: e-UCC web application - anyone can file directly

mail.note: Paper filings not accepted since Dec 1, 2015

in_person.note: By appointment only for other matters

outreach_needed: HIGH: Application process for Authorized Searcher status
HIGH: Whether program is open to new applicants or closed/grandfathered
MEDIUM: Review UCC Administrative Rules PDF (corpfiles.delaware.gov/uccadminrules.pdf)
MEDIUM: Technology/system access requirements for Authorized Searchers
MEDIUM: Fees and timeline for becoming authorized

filing_office.agency: Florida Department of State, Division of Corporations (operations privatized)
filing_office.division: FloridaUCC, LLC / Image API, LLC (now Docufree) — private operator under F.S. 679.527
filing_office.physical_address: 2002 Old St. Augustine Rd., Bldg. D, Tallahassee, FL 32301
filing_office.mailing_address: Image API, LLC, UCC Filings, P.O. Box 5588, Tallahassee, FL 32314

authorization_model.description: NO formal authorized searcher program. The Florida Secured Transaction Registry (FSTR) is statutorily required to be open to the public. Searching is free, no account required. Filing requires free account creation. System privatized since Oct 1, 2001 under FloridaUCC, LLC.

requirements.application_forms: None for searching; free online registration for filing
requirements.fees_for_access: None - searching is free; filing account is free
requirements.entity_eligibility: Open to public - any individual or entity

online_portal.description: Free public UCC search - no account required. Database covers Jan 1997 to present.

online_filing.description: Free account required for online filing

xml_api.description: UCC XML API for programmatic/bulk filing via HTTP POST

mail.address: Image API, LLC, UCC Filings, P.O. Box 5588, Tallahassee, FL 32314

in_person.address: 2002 Old St. Augustine Rd., Bldg. D, Tallahassee, FL 32301

states.turnaround_time: Immediate for online searches; electronic filings processed immediately; paper 3-5 business days
outreach_needed: Verify exact current fee schedule (floridaucc.com/fees requires JavaScript)
UCC XML API enrollment process and eligibility
ACH Debit Account setup form and requirements
Certified search (UCC-11) exact fee and turnaround
Bulk data download availability for UCC records
states.special_notes: Florida UCC system is PRIVATIZED. Non-standard search logic - ALL debtor name errors are fatal per Florida Supreme Court. Staff-assisted searches discontinued April 2005.

filing_office.agency: Georgia Superior Court Clerks' Cooperative Authority (GSCCCA)
filing_office.division: N/A - GSCCCA handles UCC directly (NOT Secretary of State)

authorization_model.description: Subscription/Account Access model. No formal authorized searcher program. Any person or entity can search by creating a GSCCCA account. Free Limited-Use accounts provide basic search. Paid tiers ($14.95-29.95/month) provide image access.

requirements.application_forms: None - self-service online registration at account.gsccca.org
requirements.entity_eligibility: Open to any individual or entity

online_portal.description: GSCCCA UCC Search Portal - name search, file number search, secured party search, certified search
online_portal.cost: Free with Limited-Use account; $14.95-29.95/month for image access

limited_use.features: Search indexes, view summaries, no images

in_person.note: Free terminals at all 159 Clerk of Superior Court offices

efiling.description: eFiling portal for UCC-1 and UCC-3 forms

monitoring.description: Filing Activity Notification System (FANS) for proactive monitoring

outreach_needed: UCC Administrative Rules full text (Rev. July 2025)
Bulk/API search access for commercial use
Mail-based UCC-11 process and fees
Escrow account setup for eFiling
